# generated by Surgeist public API artifact tooling

pub surgeist_shape::BoundsKind::Source
pub surgeist_shape::BoundsKind::Stroke
pub surgeist_shape::BoundsKind::Support
pub surgeist_shape::BoundsKind::Transformed
pub surgeist_shape::BoundsKind::Visual

pub fn surgeist_shape::Stroke::default() -> Self

impl surgeist_shape::Transform
pub const surgeist_shape::Transform::IDENTITY: Self
pub const fn surgeist_shape::Transform::identity() -> Self
pub fn surgeist_shape::Transform::inverse(self) -> core::option::Option<Self>
pub const fn surgeist_shape::Transform::matrix(self) -> [f64; 6]
pub fn surgeist_shape::Transform::to_kurbo(self) -> kurbo::affine::Affine
pub fn surgeist_shape::Transform::try_apply_point(self, point: surgeist_shape::Point) -> surgeist_shape::Result<surgeist_shape::Point>
pub fn surgeist_shape::Transform::try_apply_rect(self, rect: surgeist_shape::Rect) -> surgeist_shape::Result<surgeist_shape::Rect>
pub fn surgeist_shape::Transform::try_new(matrix: [f64; 6]) -> surgeist_shape::Result<Self>
pub fn surgeist_shape::Transform::try_rotate(radians: f64) -> surgeist_shape::Result<Self>
pub fn surgeist_shape::Transform::try_scale(x: f64, y: f64) -> surgeist_shape::Result<Self>
pub fn surgeist_shape::Transform::try_then(self, next: Self) -> surgeist_shape::Result<Self>
pub fn surgeist_shape::Transform::try_translate(x: f64, y: f64) -> surgeist_shape::Result<Self>
impl core::default::Default for surgeist_shape::Transform
pub fn surgeist_shape::Transform::default() -> Self
pub type surgeist_shape::Result<T> = core::result::Result<T, surgeist_shape::Error>
